steps.title: Locate the specific museum display claim
steps.content: The passage explicitly identifies what was displayed at the Petersen Automotive Museum in 2017: “a life-size piñata-like sculpture of the Gypsy Rose lowrider car.” The decisive clue is that the artwork was a sculpture of a lowrider car.

steps.title: Match that description to the choices
steps.content: Choice B—a sculpture of a lowrider car—is exactly what the text describes. Choices A and C name paintings, not sculptures, and choice D names a sculpture of the driver, not the vehicle. That matches choice B — B is correct.
